calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:45AM
Judge Pro Tem Steve Weber, clerk J. Kong, not reported, D525.
Cause called for Small Claism Appeal. Appellant, Broadway Hotel, appears by Ovays Patel; respondent,Priscilla O'Donnell, appears as pro per. Parties previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Steve Weber.

Judge Weber viewed appellant's rent contract and respondent, Priscilla O'donnell newly evidence in the open court after the parties has reviewed each other's evidence.

EXHA (1) Dewey pest control co. bill statements
EXHA (2) Request for reimbursement of rental payments/various documents

10:16am
Matter is submitted. Newly Evidence retained.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-25-2013 Judgment Entered
